options.zh: 用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单
options.en: DEC VAX computer orders using production rules

options.zh: 用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠
用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索

explanation.zh: R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。
explanation.en: R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders.
